model:      - Per-token wrappedDEK is stored on-chain and rotated by the oracle on        every transfer. The oracle signs an EIP-712 typed-data proof binding        (action, tokenId, from, to, newPointer, dataHash, nonce); the        contract `ecrecover`s the proof against the stored oracle address.      - Standard ERC-721 transfer paths are disabled. Skipping the oracle        would leave the new owner unable to read agent memory.      - revoke() zeroes wrappedDEK, marks the token revoked, and writes to        the bound MemoryRevocation registry. The registry binding is fixed        at construction.      - Owner-of-this-contract is the admin. Used only to rotate the oracle        address. Ownable2Step is used so a typo can't lock out the admin.","errors":{"ERC721IncorrectOwner(address,uint256,address)":[{"details":"Indicates an error related to the ownership over a particular token. Used in transfers.","params":{"owner":"Address of the current owner of a token.","sender":"Address whose tokens are being transferred.","tokenId":"Identifier number of a token."}}],"ERC721InsufficientApproval(address,uint256)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the `operator`\u2019s approval. Used in transfers.","params":{"operator":"Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.","tokenId":"Identifier number of a token."}}],"ERC721InvalidApprover(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.","params":{"approver":"Address initiating an approval operation."}}],"ERC721InvalidOperator(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.","params":{"operator":"Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner."}}],"ERC721InvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"Indicates that an address can't be an owner. For example, `address(0)` is a forbidden owner in ERC-20. Used in balance queries.","params":{"owner":"Address of the current owner of a token."}}],"ERC721InvalidReceiver(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.","params":{"receiver":"Address to which tokens are being transferred."}}],"ERC721InvalidSender(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. The oracle gate is the only sanctioned path."},"balanceOf(address)":{"details":"See {IERC721-balanceOf}."},"constructor":{"params":{"_oracle":"Initial oracle address. Cannot be zero. Rotatable via        `setOracle`.","_revocationRegistry":"The bound MemoryRevocation contract. Cannot        be zero. Must be non-zero.","wrappedDEK":"DEK wrapped under `to`'s pubkey. Max 2048 bytes."},"returns":{"tokenId":"The freshly minted token id."}},"name()":{"details":"See {IERC721Metadata-name}."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"ownerOf(uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC721-ownerOf}."},"pendingOwner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the pending owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"revoke(uint256,bytes32,bytes)":{"params":{"oldKeyHash":"keccak256 of the wrappedDEK being destroyed; must                   equal the proof's dataHash.","oracleProof":"Proof binding the revocation.","tokenId":"The token to revoke."}},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"See {IERC721-safeTransferFrom}."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Disable standard safe transfers. Use `transferWithReencryption`."},"setApprovalForAll(address,bool)":{"details":"Disable operator approvals."},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"See {IERC165-supportsInterface}."},"symbol()":{"details":"See {IERC721Metadata-symbol}."},"transferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Disable standard transfers. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer."}},"stateVariables":{"_nextTokenId":{"details":"Token ids start at 1; 0 reserved as \"none\". Using a counter is      cheaper than a mapping-of-existence check elsewhere."},"revocationRegistry":{"details":"Immutable after construction."}},"title":"AgentNFT","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"Minted(uint256,address,string,bytes32)":{"notice":"Emitted on successful mint."},"OracleChanged(address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when the admin rotates the oracle address."},"Revoked(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Emitted exactly once per token, when its memory is revoked."},"Transferred(uint256,address,address,bytes32)":{"notice":"Emitted on successful re-encryption transfer."},"UsageAuthorizationChanged(uint256,address,bool)":{"notice":"Emitted when the admin authorizes/deauthorizes a usage reporter."},"UsageRecorded(uint256,address,uint256,uint16)":{"notice":"Emitted by `recordUsage`. Off-chain royalty splitters listen for this."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()":{"notice":"EIP-712 domain separator. Recomputed if the chain id has         changed since deployment (forks, rare)."},"authorizeUsage(uint256,address,bool)":{"notice":"Authorize or deauthorize an address to call `recordUsage` on a token."},"getAgent(uint256)":{"notice":"Full agent record. Reverts if the token does not exist."},"mint(address,string,bytes32,bytes32,bytes,uint16)":{"notice":"Mint a new agent iNFT."},"oracle()":{"notice":"Address whose key signs OracleProofs. Settable by admin."},"recordUsage(uint256,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emit a `UsageRecorded` event for off-chain royalty splitters.         Does not transfer funds; accounting is downstream."},"revocationRegistry()":{"notice":"The MemoryRevocation registry this contract writes to."},"revoke(uint256,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Permanently revoke the agent's memory key."},"setOracle(address)":{"notice":"Rotate the oracle address. Admin-only."},"tokenNonce(uint256)":{"notice":"Per-token monotonic counter. Incremented after each successful         `transferWithReencryption` or `revoke`."},"tokenURI(uint256)":{"notice":"ERC-721 tokenURI. Returns a deterministic `data:` URI carrying         the metadata hash so off-chain indexers can join with 0G         Storage content without this contract hosting JSON."},"transferWithReencryption(address,uint256,bytes32,bytes,bytes)":{"notice":"Transfer a token to a new owner, atomically rotating the         encrypted memory pointer and re-wrapping the DEK."},"usageAuthorized(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Whether `user` may call `recordUsage` on `tokenId`. acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

approve(address,uint256).details: Disable approvals. The oracle gate is the only sanctioned path.

params._oracle: Initial oracle address. Cannot be zero. Rotatable via        `setOracle`.
params._revocationRegistry: The bound MemoryRevocation contract. Cannot        be zero. Cannot be changed after deployment.

params.encryptedPointer: 0G Storage root hash for the encrypted memory.
params.metadataHash: Non-zero hash of canonical agent config.
params.wrappedDEK: DEK wrapped under `to`'s pubkey. Max 2048 bytes.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.oldKeyHash: keccak256 of the wrappedDEK being destroyed; must                   equal the proof's dataHash.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

DOMAIN_SEPARATOR().notice: EIP-712 domain separator. Recomputed if the chain id has         changed since deployment (forks, rare).

authorizeUsage(uint256,address,bool).notice: Authorize or deauthorize an address to call `recordUsage` on a token.

getAgent(uint256).notice: Full agent record. Reverts if the token does not exist.

oracle().notice: Address whose key signs OracleProofs. Settable by admin.

recordUsage(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Emit a `UsageRecorded` event for off-chain royalty splitters.         Does not transfer funds; accounting is downstream.

revocationRegistry().notice: The MemoryRevocation registry this contract writes to.

revoke(uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Permanently revoke the agent's memory key.

tokenNonce(uint256).notice: Per-token monotonic counter. Incremented after each successful         `transferWithReencryption` or `revoke`.

tokenURI(uint256).notice: ERC-721 tokenURI. Returns a deterministic `data:` URI carrying         the metadata hash so off-chain indexers can join with 0G         Storage content without this contract hosting JSON.

transferWithReencryption(address,uint256.notice: Transfer a token to a new owner, atomically rotating the         encrypted memory pointer and re-wrapping the DEK.

usageAuthorized(uint256,address).notice: Whether `user` may call `recordUsage` on `tokenId`. The token         owner is implicitly authorized in addition to this map.
